GRANT MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. BURDEN SHIFTS ON BOTH RETAINED CONTROL AND DANGEROUS CONDITION PER EVIDENCE THAT DEFENDANT CEASED CONTROL TO GENERAL. (CW)

rulings.Case Title: TINDER PRODUCTION INC VS MICHEL MICHELIS
rulings.Rulings: MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS DENIED. CAUSE OF ACTION PROPERLY PLEADED ACCORDING TO THEIR LEGAL INTENDMENT AND EFFECT. DENY SUMMARY ADJUDICATION. TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT RE WHETHER DEFENDANT BREACHED THE CONTRACT OR WAS EXCUSED FROM PERFORMANCE. (PB)
